name: Session Switching
summary: Frontend sidebar component for switching between active agent sessions
goals: Enable quick switching between multiple agent sessions

specDetail.description: A Sidebar component that lists all active agent sessions for the current project. Allows users to click on a session to switch to it, loading the conversation history and state for the selected session.

parameters.name: sessions
parameters.description: List of active sessions to display

parameters.name: activeSessionId
parameters.description: Currently active session ID for highlighting

parameters.name: onSessionSelect
parameters.description: Callback invoked when a session is selected

constraints: Must load session data within 300ms of selection
Must preserve scroll position and input state when switching sessions
Must visually indicate the currently active session

acceptanceCriteria.given: multiple sessions exist for a project
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user clicks a different session in the sidebar
acceptanceCriteria.then: the conversation view switches to the selected session with its full history

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
